---
title: "GC_Collate_Data_CO2xNxPhrag"
author: "Brenden Blakley"
date: "2025-08-25"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(ggpattern)

```

```{r , echo=FALSE}

CH4_processed_files <- c("Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_CH4_202507_1.csv", "Processed Data/GCReW_CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_CH4_202507_2.csv")
data_CH4 <- map(CH4_processed_files, read.csv)

# Combining Files
df_combo <- bind_rows(data_CH4)
```

## Visualize Data
```{r Visualize Data, echo=FALSE}
cat("Visualize Data")

### Ammonia 
CH4_forplot <- df_combo

CH4_forplot <- CH4_forplot %>%
  mutate(Treatment = ifelse(
    CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
      N_Treatment == "Amended",
    "eCO2_N",
    ifelse(
      CO2_Treatment == "Elevated" &
        N_Treatment == "Ambient",
      "eCO2",
      ifelse(CO2_Treatment == "Ambient" &
               N_Treatment == "Amended"  , "N" , "Ambient")
    )
  ))
    
   
  
viz_CH4_plot2 <- ggplot(data = CH4_forplot, aes(
  x = as.factor(CO2_Treatment),
  y = CH4_Conc_uM,
  fill = as.factor(Treatment),
  color = as.factor(N_Treatment),
  pattern = as.factor(SubPlot)
)) +
  geom_bar_pattern(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single"),
                   pattern_angle = 45,
                   pattern_density = 0.1,
                   pattern_spacing = 0.025,
                   pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(Depth_cm ~ N_Treatment, scales = "fixed") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
    "eCO2_N" = "#DB5461",
    "eCO2" = "#454ADE", 
    "N" = "white",
    "Ambient" = "white"
  ),
    breaks = c("eCO2", "eCO2_N", "Ambient"),
    labels = c("eCO2","eCO2","aCO2")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Ambient" = "#454ADE",
    "Amended" = "#DB5461"
  )) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c(A = "stripe", B = "none")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ",
       y = "CH4 (umol/L)",
       title = "CO2xNxPhrag: Porewater Methane",
       fill = "CO2 Treatment:",
       color = "N Treatment:",
       pattern = "Subplot:") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.8
    )
  ) +
coord_flip()
print(viz_CH4_plot2)


```
